rulings.Case Title: MARILOU D SAMSON VS. ONE WEST BANK, FSB et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 7, line 1. DEFENDANT ONE WEST BANK, FSB's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. Plaintiff failed to allege all elements of claim, specifically defendants' adverse claim to title, and failed to tender amounts owed under the note secured by Deed of Trust. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARILOU D SAMSON VS. ONE WEST BANK, FSB et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 7, line 1. DEFENDANT US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. Plaintiff failed to allege all elements of claim, specifically defendants' adverse claim to title, and failed to tender amounts owed under the note secured by Deed of Trust. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HENRY WONG VS. LOLITA SWEET et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 7, line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT HENRY WONG's DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT Continued to September 4, 2013. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C no later than August 16, 2013 and provide a courtesy copy of the pleading being challenged with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HENRY WONG VS. LOLITA SWEET et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 7, line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT HENRY WONG, RICHARD HURLBURT and BENJAMIN HUMPHREY's MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT Continued to September 4, 2013 to be heard with other pending motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HENRY WONG VS. LOLITA SWEET et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 7, line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT RICHARD HURLBURT and BENJAMIN HUMPHREY's DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT Continued to September 4, 2013 to be heard with other pending motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANNETTE HORNSBY VS. NEW CENTURY MORTGAGE CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 7, line 3. PLAINTIFF ANNETTE HORNSBY's Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint DENIED. Untimely per CCP 1005. No OST on file. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SHIRLEY TENE VS. NANCY TAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 7, line 4. PLAINTIFF SHIRLEY TENE's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD GRANTED. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FRANK BORN VS. MARIA GONZALEZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 7, line 5. DEFENDANT MARIA GONZALEZ and LILA GONZALEZ-GARFINKEL's AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges each cause of action. Cause of action for negligence is not uncertain. Any improper or false allegations are not properly challenged by demurrer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KELLY A. ARCHER et al VS. MAURICE OHAYON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Entry Of Money Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 7, line 6. PLAINTIFF ROSALIND NG's Motion For Entry Of Money Judgment Hearing Required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JENNY GEE VS. OSCAR AVILA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 7, line 7. DEFENDANT OSCAR AVILA's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with 5 day leave to amend. Non-oppositions and request for leave to amend filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KAY LEE VS. GUEN HEE KIM et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 7, line 8. DEFENDANT GUEN KIM's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges estimated amount of rent due and is not uncertain. Whether or not estimation was proper in this case is an issue of fact. See Sublease Agreement Paragraphs 3 and 4. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GEORGE C. LOUIE, TRUSTEE OF THE TRUST OF GEORGE C. VS. TOMONORI YASUDA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel Responses To Disco
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 7, line 9. PLAINTIFF GEORGE C. LOUIE, TRUSTEE OF THE TRUST OF GEORGE C.'s Motion To Compel Responses to Discovery GRANTED, subject to opposition. Sanctions granted in the amount of $885. = (501/REQ)
